'''Hydration tablets''' were tablets designed to keep beings hydrated in situations with no access to fresh [[Water/Legends|water]] for long periods of [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="POD" /> In [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> during the time of the [[New Sith Wars]], [[Darth Bane/Legends|Bane]], a student at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban's]] [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]], used hydration tablets to survive a trip to the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]], an ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Burial/Legends|burial]] ground.<ref name="POD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hydration tablets appeared in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]].<ref name="POD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
